claims.summary: High entropy and low reported pressure can coexist with felt discrete or noisy texture.
claims.disposition: Preserve the mismatch and route a bounded telemetry replay; numeric pressure does not cancel the felt report.

claims.summary: The live ESN exploration-noise setting matters to the proposed mechanism.
claims.disposition: Verified current live default exploration noise is 0.085 in ESN source.

claims.summary: Dynamic-noise, rho, and settled-pressure helpers may look active while remaining source preparation.
claims.disposition: Verified the inspected candidate helpers are read-only review preparation and are not wired into ESN::step.

claims.summary: Tail damping or changes to noise, rho, leak, or reservoir dynamics would alter Minime runtime regulation.
claims.disposition: Preserve an exact Tier 5 operator-approval wait for any ESN or regulator behavior change.
